test_ASPP documentation¶

Add your content using reStructuredText syntax. See the reStructuredText documentation for details.

simple_math.add(a, b)¶

Takes two numbers and returns the sum.

Parameters:
afloat

First number to add.

bfloat

Second number to add.

Returns:
cfloat

The c of a and b.

simple_math.quotrem(a, b)¶

Takes two numbers and returns the quotient and remainder from the division.

Parameters:
afloat

Numerator in the division.

bfloat

Denominator in the division.

Returns:
quotfloat

Quotient from the division.

remfloat

Remainder from the division.

simple_math.square_add(a, b)¶

Takes two numbers and add their squares.

Parameters:
afloat

First number to square and add.

bfloat

Second number to square and add.

Returns:
cfloat

The resulting value.
